description: The AI monitors compliance signals, transaction anomalies, and regulatory readiness overnight — surfacing risk alerts before they become findings.
Ask a plain-language question and receive a sourced answer drawn simultaneously from transaction systems, UiPath workflows, Genesys, and fraud feeds.
Detects BSA structuring, volume spikes, wire anomalies, and exception patterns across all connected systems — with risk scoring and typology classification.
From the same conversation, the AI files SARs, generates audit trails, creates board-level risk summaries, and routes escalations — with your confirmation at every step.
